notes: PHASE 1 DEPLOYMENT FAILED & REVERTED. Metrics: WR 48.70%→37.41% (-11.3%), PF 0.949→0.5977 (-37%), TIMEOUT↑41%. ROOT CAUSE: Skip signal for extreme volatility NOT enforced in open_paper_position() line 1742 — fallback to _MAX_AGE_S opened positions that should have been blocked. CRITICAL BUG: timeout_s_adaptive=0 ignored, position opens anyway. REVERTED commit 571b792. Full code analysis created: _workspace/PHASE1_CODE_ANALYSIS_AND_POSTMORTEM.md. Lessons: (1) Integration bugs hide in fallback logic, (2) Unit tests don't guarantee integration correctness, (3) Silent defaults hide upstream failures, (4) Guardrails need pre-deployment validation.

cycles.fix_applied: V10.30 deployed: Original SL check restored as safety floor during trailing mode.
cycles.notes: V10.30 SL FIX SUCCESSFUL! Exit distribution: TP 46%, SL 24%, TIMEOUT 30%.

cycles.fix_applied: V10.47 + V10.48 + V10.49 CRITICAL FIXES. ROOT CAUSE: Learning initialized but wired to NOTHING. No record_exit() calls. No learned_tp usage. Dead code.
cycles.notes: User asked: 'is learning really working?' Investigation revealed: Learning class created but never wired into exit handler. 0% WR traced to entry quality degradation + learning being dead code. V10.49 fixes by adding record_exit() to both close paths (normal + TIMEOUT_NO_PRICE). Fresh restart with wiring active.

cycles.fix_applied: V10.48: Added missing hold_s field to closed_trade dicts (data presentation bug). V10.49: Wired learning.record_exit() into exit handler (CRITICAL infrastructure).
cycles.notes: CYCLE 48 revealed: 50 trades all TIMEOUT, 0% WR, all losses. Root cause NOT TP floor (that works), but learning completely disconnected. Learning state file missing = no data collected. Fixed by wiring record_exit() calls to close_paper_position() and TIMEOUT path.

cycles.fix_applied: V10.49: Fresh deployment with learning wired. Hetzner reset from broken merge to latest clean code.
cycles.notes: CRITICAL BREAKTHROUGH - V10.49 deployed successfully. Learning system now wired into exit handler. Fresh session started (0 closed trades, 9 open positions). Expecting learning_state.json to appear within 30 minutes as trades close. CYCLE 49 will verify learning is collecting data.

cycles.fix_applied: REVERTED Phase 1 commit 995089c. Root cause: timeout_s_adaptive=0 (skip signal) ignored at line 1742, fallback to _MAX_AGE_S opened positions in extreme volatility that should have been blocked. Full analysis: _workspace/PHASE1_CODE_ANALYSIS_AND_POSTMORTEM.md
cycles.notes: CYCLE 50: Phase 1 Adaptive Timeout System tested post-deployment. CATASTROPHIC REGRESSION: WR -11.3%, PF -37%, TIMEOUT exits +2×. ROOT CAUSE IDENTIFIED: Skip signal (timeout_s=0) for EXTREME_VOL/STAGNATION not enforced in integration. Fallback logic opened positions in worst market conditions. SOLUTION: Redesign Phase 2 with (1) skip logic in control flow, not fallback, (2) integration tests, (3) pre-deployment backtest validation.

cycles.fix_applied: Variance-guard patch: Line 878 health gate now checks buffer variance before blocking. Degenerate buffers (<0.1% range) blocked. Real trends (≥3% range) admitted. Commit 72b2839. TIMEOUT exits 93.5%→21.5%. TP exits 3%→48.4%.
cycles.notes: CYCLE 51 BREAKTHROUGH: Evidence-based forensics identified root cause: Line 878 health gate blocks real trends because it uses indicator VALUES (ADX/RSI ≥97) not buffer QUALITY. Deep investigation proved real trends show healthy high-variance buffers. Fix: add variance check to distinguish real trends (range%≥3%) from degenerate buffers (range%<0.1%). Deployed successfully. IMMEDIATE METRICS (5 min post-deploy): WR 25.08%→49.46% (+24.38!), TIMEOUT 93.5%→21.5% (72-point drop!), TP 3%→48.4% (45-point gain!). Phase 6 metrics collection running (30-min window) to verify sustained improvement.

cycles.fix_applied: Reverted commit 35a8ad1 (git revert dcfeb53). Root cause: Unit scale mismatch in learning system — regime_tp_strategy stored TP values as PERCENTAGES (0.18=18%) while cost_floor constants used FRACTIONS (0.0023=0.23%), causing 78× scale collision. TP placed unreachably far (18% away), 100% TIMEOUT rate. Revert restored Cycle 51 baseline (byte-identical state that ran at 49.46% WR).
cycles.notes: CYCLE 52 CATASTROPHIC FAILURE & RECOVERY: Pre-deploy metrics showed WR 0%, TIMEOUT 82.5%, TP exits 10.3% — complete system failure. Forensics identified unit scale mismatch in commit 35a8ad1 (learning system). All 5 validators approved revert (quota-safe, trading-safe, learning-confirmed, tests-pass, reviewer-approved). Deployed dcfeb53 successfully (4 min deploy time). Post-deploy metrics show WR recovered to 55.13% (exceeds Cycle 51 baseline 49.46%), TP exits restored to 57.7%, TIMEOUT reduced to 6.4%. GOAL ACHIEVED: WR > 50% + P&L > 0%.
